title: eleutherococcus humillimus
intro: Eleutherococcus humillimus, a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, is a type of shrub native to China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Eleutherococcus humillimus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cognitive performance. Herbal preparations of Eleutherococcus humillimus are typically available in capsule, tablet, or tea form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
